label: Curation demo — narrative-path discovery
description: A small relation-web (a patriline through time) for demonstrating curation's auto path-discovery: intersecting the time axis (chrono:before) with the bloodline axis (lineage:begat) reveals a succession narrative. Load, then run: curate "Succession" set=curation:demo:lineage rels=chrono:before,lineage:begat.
license: MIT (editorial); figures are public-domain Greek mythology
